tagline: Turn darkness to light with this sultry summer groove.
liner: Close your eyes and step out of the noise. 'Void Into Gold' is a smooth Afro R&B journey where warm live strings meet hypnotic reggae basslines, creating a sanctuary for healing. As female vocals drift over glitch-hop textures, you release societal pressure and internal alarms to embrace self-love under a summer night sky. This track blends Sade-like elegance with electronic flourishes to guide you from cold walls into radiant light. It is an invitation to close the laptop on your burdens and let the bass roll low until only peace remains.
worldCaption: A sultry summer night where warm strings, glowing beach bottles, and a rolling bassline transform mental voids into golden healing moments u

bios.lead: Drifts like smoke over the groove with smoky elegance.
bios.back: Weaves harmony layers that lift the soul higher and deeper.
bios.drums: Keeps the floor shaking without ever rushing the beat too fast.
bios.perc: Adds subtle textures to keep relaxation interesting at every turn.
bios.bass: Rolls low through the smoke with a hypnotic reggae-style hum.
bios.synth: Paints cinematic violins that bridge electronic and organic sounds perfectly.
bios.other: Glitches gently around edges like digital fireflies in summer night air.
bios.guitar: Plucks warm notes to replace cold walls with sunlight instantly.
